---
title: "Photography Gallery"
subtitle: "Moments captured in time"
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
  loop: true
---

<style>
/* ========== 全局样式 ========== */
body {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f7fa 0%, #e4e8ec 100%);
}

/* ========== 页面标题样式 ========== */
.title {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2c3e50 0%, #4a5568 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
}

.subtitle {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  font-style: italic;
  color: #718096;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* ========== 分隔线样式 ========== */
.divider {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 3rem 0 2rem 0;
}

.divider::before,
.divider::after {
  content: '';
  flex: 1;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e0;
}

.divider-icon {
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
  color: #a0aec0;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
}

/* ========== 章节标题样式 ========== */
h3 {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1.8rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #2d3748;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 2.5rem 0 1.5rem 0;
  position: relative;
}

h3::after {
  content: '';
  display: block;
  width: 60px;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #a0aec0, transparent);
  margin: 0.8rem auto 0;
}

/* ========== 图片容器样式 ========== */
.gallery-container {
  background: white;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  margin: 1rem 0;
}

/* ========== 图片样式 ========== */
.quarto-figure {
  margin: 0.5rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.quarto-figure img {
  border-radius: 12px;
  transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  filter: brightness(0.98);
}

.quarto-figure img:hover {
  transform: scale(1.03);
  filter: brightness(1.02);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
}

/* ========== 隐藏图片说明 ========== */
figcaption {
  display: none; 
}

/* ========== 介绍文字样式 ========== */
.intro-text {
  text-align: center;
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto 2rem auto;
  line-height: 1.8;
}

/* ========== 提示框样式 ========== */
.callout-tip {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f7fafc 0%, #edf2f7 100%);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 12px;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}

.callout-tip p {
  color: #718096;
  font-style: italic;
  margin: 0;
}

/* ========== 页脚样式 ========== */
.footer-decoration {
  text-align: center;
  margin: 3rem 0 1rem 0;
  color: #a0aec0;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  letter-spacing: 8px;
}

/* ========== 响应式调整 ========== */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .gallery-container {
    padding: 0.8rem;
  }
  
  h3 {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
  }
  
  .intro-text {
    font-size: 1rem;
    padding: 0 1rem;
  }
}
</style>

<!-- 引入 Google Fonts -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;1,400&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

::: {.intro-text}
A curated collection of moments — from sweeping landscapes to intimate urban scenes. Each frame tells its own story.
:::

<div class="divider"><span class="divider-icon">✦</span></div>

### Landscapes & Cityscapes

::: {.gallery-container}
::: {layout-ncol=2}

![](images/gallery/gallery-01.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-04.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-05.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-06.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-07.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-02.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

:::
:::

<div class="divider"><span class="divider-icon">✦</span></div>

### Vertical Perspectives

::: {.gallery-container}
::: {layout-ncol=3}

![](images/gallery/gallery-03.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

:::
:::

<div class="divider"><span class="divider-icon">✦</span></div>

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
✨ Click on any image to view in full screen
:::

::: {.footer-decoration}
· · ·
:::
